description: Informal note from ʿAbd al-Karīm to R. Yosef. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: perhaps Mamluk-era; Yemeni hand? The sender asks the addressee to urgently send his grandmother ("the mother of Sutayta") for Shabbat, because the boy himself is sick (mā kān ṭayyib) and so is his father. The father had been carried home (maḥmūl) on a bed (?) on Wednesday. (Information mainly from Goitein's index cards.) ASE.
tags: illness: nursing, illness: letter norms, Illness, illness: children's, illness: urgent letter, illness letter 969-1517, informal note, personal
description_he: פתק בלתי-פורמלי מעבד אל-כרים לר' יוסף. ביהודית-ערבית. השולח מבקש בדחיפות לשלוח את סבתו לשבת, כיוון שהילד עצמו חולה וגם אביו. האב הובא הביתה על מיטה ביום רביעי.
